dashboard.label: Zero-Trust Executive Blueprint
dashboard.description: Production-ready view showcasing the Zero-Trust compliance layout bypassing dashboard rendering quirks.

search.query: | makeresults | eval from="ROOT_NODE", to="policy-plane-root", type="AWS::IAM::Role", node_label="Zero-Trust Boundary", edge_label="" | append [ | makeresults | eval from="ROOT_NODE", to="data-plane-root", type="AWS::IAM::Role", node_label="Zero-Trust Boundary", edge_label="" ] | append [ | makeresults | eval from="ROOT_NODE", to="identity-plane-root", type="AWS::IAM::Role", node_label="Zero-Trust Boundary", edge_label="" ] | append [ | makeresults | eval from="policy-plane-root", to="pe-engine", type="AWS::Resource", node_label="Policy Engine (PE)", edge_label="", group="Policy Plane" ] | append [ | makeresults | eval from="pe-engine", to="pa-admin", type="AWS::Resource", node_label="Policy Administrator (PA)", edge_label="Decision Channel", group="Policy Plane" ] | append [ | makeresults | eval from="identity-plane-root", to="developer-user", type="AWS::IAM::User", node_label="Developer User", edge_label="", group="Identity Plane" ] | append [ | makeresults | eval from="developer-user", to="bastion-host", type="AWS::EC2::Instance", node_label="Bastion Host", edge_label="Assume Role", group="Identity Plane" ] | append [ | makeresults | eval from="data-plane-root", to="bastion-host", type="AWS::EC2::Instance", node_label="Bastion Host", edge_label="", group="Data Plane" ] | append [ | makeresults | eval from="bastion-host", to="web-server", type="AWS::EC2::Instance", node_label="Web Server", edge_label="SSH/22", group="Data Plane" ] | append [ | makeresults | eval from="web-server", to="db-server", type="AWS::RDS::DBInstance", node_label="DB Server", edge_label="SQL/3306", group="Data Plane" ] | lookup my_asset_inventory_lookup resourceId as from OUTPUT role as inv_role asset_count as inv_count | eval node_label=if(isnotnull(inv_count), node_label + " (" + inv_count + " Active)", node_label) | fields from to type node_label edge_label group status
